queries.question: For each music festival, show the music genres that they include.
queries.sql: select music_festivals.festival_name , genres.genre_name from Music_Festivals_Genres join Genres on Music_Festivals_Genres.genre_id = Genres.genre_id join Music_Festivals on Music_Festivals_Genres.music_festival_id = Music_Festivals.festival_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?festival_name ?genre_name WHERE {
  ?music_festivals_genres a :Music_Festivals_Genres .
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?music_festivals_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?music_festivals a :Music_Festivals .
  ?music_festivals_genres p:hasMusic_Festivals ?music_festivals .
  ?music_festivals p:festival_name ?festival_name .
  ?genres p:genre_name ?genre_name .
}

queries.question: Give me the music genres that each music festival includes.
queries.sql: SELECT Genres.genre_name  from Music_Festivals_Genres join Genres on Music_Festivals_Genres.genre_id = Genres.genre_id join Music_Festivals on Music_Festivals_Genres.music_festival_id = Music_Festivals.festival_id   GROUP BY Music_Festivals_Genres.genre_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Music_Festivals_Genres.music_festival_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Music_Festivals)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the music genres that each music festival includes.
